caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of dark gray acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small black logo on the left chest that reads "Bliss & Haste". He is positioned in front of a professional silver and black microphone held by a shock mount and boom arm. In the initial sequence, he speaks into the microphone while looking slightly off-camera. As the scene progresses, he raises his right hand, which features several tattoos, and rests it on top of his head while continuing to speak. Throughout the progression, his expression remains focused, and the camera maintains a close-up shot of his upper body and head.
